rationale_top3: Nature & Location: Strong nature score (18/20) highlights the park's stunning beachfront setting on Stockton Beach with direct beach access and natural coastal environment Entertainment & Facilities: Solid entertainment score (10/15) indicates good amenities for families including pool and recreational facilities Cleanliness & Value: Consistent scores (10/15 each) demonstrate well-maintained facilities and reasonable pricing for the beachside location
rationale_honourable: Site size score (8/10) shows adequate pitch sizes for most camping and caravan needs, contributing to overall guest comfort
water_fun: Pool facilities available on-site; primary drawcard is direct access to Stockton Beach for swimming, surfing, and beach activities
kids_play: Entertainment facilities provided including playground areas suitable for families with children of various ages
pet_detail: Pet score of 0 indicates pets are not permitted at this park
best_for: Beach holidays, family getaways, coastal camping, Newcastle exploration, surfing enthusiasts
